instruction: Enable Night Light, set the color temperature to 3700, and create ~/Desktop/night_light_status.txt with exactly two lines: enabled=true and temperature=3700.

result.command:
enabled=$(gsettings get org.gnome.settings-daemon.plugins.color night-light-enabled 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' '); temp=$(gsettings get org.gnome.settings-daemon.plugins.color night-light-temperature 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' '); ok=1; [ "$enabled" = "true" ] || ok=0; [ "$temp" = "uint323700" ] || [ "$temp" = "3700" ] || ok=0; expected=$(cat <<'EOF'
enabled=true
temperature=3700
EOF
); actual=$(cat ~/Desktop/night_light_status.txt 2>/dev/null); [ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || ok=0; if [ "$ok" = "1" ]; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi
